---
title: "Telegram"
platform_slug: "telegram"
sources:
  ugc:
    BR: data/global/telegram/ugc.yml
    EU: data/global/telegram/ugc.yml
    UK: data/regional/UK/telegram/ugc.yml
  ads:
    BR: data/global/telegram/ads.yml
    EU: data/global/telegram/ads.yml
    UK: data/global/telegram/ads.yml
---

Telegram provides an API for third-party apps to display sponsored messages that replicate Telegram functionality. However, the API endpoints do not provide access to a comprehensive ad database. The ad-related endpoints return only active ads in known channels so that the Telegram clients can show them to their users. Telegram also offers the [Telegram Ad Platform](ads.telegram.org) for creating and managing sponsored messages in public channels, enabling advertisers to manage their ads and budgets and monitor performance. However, this is also not a public ad repository for extracting data about all advertising content promoted on the platform.

## Transparency Assessment


```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
import sys
from pathlib import Path
project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))
from utils.responses_aggregator import generate_platform_question_sections
```

```{python}
#| label: platform-summary
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from utils.platform_summary import generate_platform_summary
generate_platform_summary("telegram")
```

## Detailed Assessment


## User-Generated Content

```{python}
#| label: ugc-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="telegram",
    question_type="ugc",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```

## Advertising

```{python}
#| label: ads-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="telegram",
    question_type="ads",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
